description: Window-based detection configuration - analyzes entire windows of CSI data
detection_window_seconds_desc: Size of CSI data window to analyze (seconds). Larger = more stable patterns.
detection_update_interval_desc: How often (seconds) to run pattern detection on accumulated window.
min_frames_for_detection_desc: Minimum CSI frames required in window before running detection.

quick_response.description: Faster updates, less stable - good for testing

balanced.description: Good balance between stability and responsiveness (current default)

very_stable.description: Maximum stability, slower to respond to changes

how_it_works: 1. Continuously collect CSI signatures and energy values
2. Every 'detection_update_interval' seconds, take last 'detection_window_seconds' of data
3. Pattern detector analyzes the entire window at once (not frame-by-frame)
4. Update detection state based on window analysis
5. This matches WiFi CSI patterns better than instant detection
